function.name: WebSearch
function.description: Executes an internet search to retrieve real-time data. Use this to find current events, up-to-date facts, or external technical documentation not present in your training data.

function.name: ReadFile
function.description: Reads and returns the exact text content of a specified local file. Use this immediately when asked to inspect, analyze, debug, or summarize a specific file.

path.description: The relative or absolute path to the file.

function.name: ListDir
function.description: Returns a list of all files and folders within a given directory. Use this to inspect project structures, verify file existence, or explore the local file system.

path.description: The path to list. Use '.' for the current directory.

function.name: CreateFile
function.description: Creates a new, empty local file at the specified path. Use this to initialize a file before writing content or when scaffolding a new project structure.

path.description: The relative or absolute path where the new file should be created.

function.name: WriteFile
function.description: Writes or overwrites text content to a specified local file. Use this immediately when asked to save generated code, modify existing scripts, or update configurations.

path.description: The relative or absolute path to the file.

content.description: The exact text or code to write into the file.

function.name: DeleteFile
function.description: Permanently deletes a specified local file. Use this to remove temporary files, clean up deprecated scripts, or fulfill explicit deletion requests.

path.description: The relative or absolute path to the file to be deleted.
